meaning: n.铺设中的铁路末端,终点,尽头,军需站
examples: The goods will be sent to the railhead by lorry.
The goods will be send to the railhead by lorry.
This series machine is single column vertical lathe, it has a railhead and a side head.
For instance, the completion of a railhead in Mazar-e-Sharif this year will link the Uzbek and Afghan railways.
In those great Westerns about cattle ranching, John Wayne normally leads his steers on a long trek to the railhead.
